name: tabstack
title: Tabstack
description: Read, research, and act on the web from your keyboard. Powered by Tabstack.
author: JustSteveKing

commands.name: extract
commands.title: Extract to Markdown
commands.description: Turn any URL into clean Markdown

commands.name: generate
commands.title: Analyze a Page
commands.description: AI summary and analysis of any URL

commands.name: research
commands.title: Research a Question
commands.description: Get a cited answer from across the web

preferences.name: researchMode
preferences.title: Depth
preferences.description: Fast is quicker; Balanced consults more sources

commands.name: automate
commands.title: Automate a Task
commands.description: Run a browser agent on a page and read the result

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
